overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a yellow shirt and hat exploring a swampy bayou environment. The character transitions from a wooden boardwalk overlooking marshlands to a dirt path leading toward a large white plantation mansion, encountering NPCs including a horse rider and pedestrians along the way.

events.description: horse rider passes by on the boardwalk from left to right
pedestrian woman in purple dress walks past the character
character stands up from railing and begins walking forward along the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: initially standing and sitting on the wooden railing observing the swamp, then begins walking along the boardwalk

notable_agents.action: man riding a dark horse passing by on the boardwalk
woman in a purple dress and hat walking past the character

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with weathered planks extending over the swamp
murky green water with lily pads and aquatic vegetation
tall trees with Spanish moss hanging from branches surrounding the water
simple wooden fence posts and rails lining the boardwalk edge
large white plantation-style house visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a weathered wooden boardwalk overlooking a murky swamp surrounded by cypress trees draped in Spanish moss. A horse rider passes by on the left, followed by a pedestrian woman walking past on the right. The character then begins walking along the boardwalk toward a distant white mansion visible through the trees.

events.description: character steps off the wooden boardwalk onto a dirt path surrounded by grass and trees
character passes a man in a white shirt walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the swamp toward the mansion

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and hat walking toward the character on the dirt path

entered.detail: unpaved earthy trail with patches of grass and mud
open wooden gazebo with a green roof visible among the trees
massive oak tree with spreading branches casting shadows on the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the boardwalk behind, the character transitions onto a dirt path winding through dense vegetation. A wooden gazebo appears on the right as the character passes a man in a white shirt. The white mansion grows larger in the center view as the character progresses along the trail.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path approaching the large white mansion complex

entered.detail: small wooden outbuilding or cottage visible through the trees on the left
wooden fence posts marking the boundary of the mansion grounds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the final stretch of dirt path toward the imposing white mansion, which now dominates the center of the frame. The gazebo moves closer on the right side while a small cottage appears on the left. The vegetation opens up to reveal the manicured grounds surrounding the mansion complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a weathered swamp boardwalk toward the imposing facade of a white plantation mansion. It begins with the character standing amidst cypress trees draped in Spanish moss as a horse rider and a pedestrian pass by, before the camera follows the character walking forward toward a distant building. As the character leaves the boardwalk, the scene shifts to a winding dirt path through dense vegetation, passing a man in a white shirt and a wooden gazebo. The path then opens up, revealing a small cottage on the left and the manicured grounds of the estate. Finally, the camera advances along the final stretch of trail as the massive white mansion grows to dominate the center of the frame.
